name: The Keep
description:
Suit Hammers (Str)

Alignment neutral good

The Keep represents steadfastness and being unshakable to threats. As long as The Keep is invested, you gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects. Whenever you become , reduce the condition value by 1 (to a minimum of 0). If you are 20th level, the item bonus increases to +3.

Activate 2 envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast . The rank of the spell is one-half your level, rounded down (minimum 7th level), and the interior of the mansion appears to be the inside of a resplendent keep made of stone.
